# http_get_responder: gate one inbound connection, deliver a GET request,
# expect the fixed HTTP/1.1 200 response.
tcp_accept on=127.0.0.1:8080 from=192.0.2.55:54321
deliver to=127.0.0.1:8080 from=192.0.2.55:54321 hex=474554202f20485454502f312e310d0a486f73743a206c6f63616c686f73740d0a0d0a
expect  from=127.0.0.1:8080 to=192.0.2.55:54321   hex=485454502f312e3120323030204f4b0d0a436f6e74656e742d4c656e6774683a20350d0a436f6e74656e742d547970653a20746578742f706c61696e0d0a0d0a68656c6c6f
